title: neoboutonia macrocalyx
intro: Neoboutonia macrocalyx, a plant species native to tropical Africa, is a type of shrub or tree that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, Neoboutonia macrocalyx has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Neoboutonia macrocalyx is typically prepared for consumption as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations may also involve the use of the plant's leaves, bark, or roots.
